description: Finds a parent object above Instance (Slot) that matches the given arguments

fields.Instance: The slot to scan for parent slots with.
fields.Name: The name to look for above Instance (Slot).
fields.MatchSubstring: Whether to search for parents above Instance (Slot) that their name contains Name (String) instead of the entire name being equal.
fields.IgnoreCase: Whether the capitalization should matter or not when searching for a parent above Instance (Slot).
fields.SearchDepth:
How far to search for a parent with the provided search arguments

Examples: 0 > Search immediate parent. 1 > Search parent of slot and it's next parent. -1 > Search all the way to Root (CAN BE HEAVY)
